problem: Deep security audit (ADR-253) identified 71 findings: silent error swallowing (.catch(() => {})), race conditions in Firestore operations, unprotected API routes, and client-side writes without server validation.
cause: Accumulated technical debt from rapid feature development. Fire-and-forget operations silently swallowed errors, Firestore read-then-write patterns lacked transactions, cron endpoints missing auth verification.
filesChanged: src/app/api/accounting/documents/route.ts (A7 zombie fix — error status update)
solution: Phase 1: Created safeFireAndForget/clientSafeFireAndForget utility. Phase 2: Added CRON_SECRET + rate limiting to 3 API routes. Phase 3: Replaced 33 .catch(() => {}) patterns with logged fire-and-forget. Phase 4: Wrapped 6 Firestore operations in runTransaction (loginCount atomic increment, ownership finalize/unlock, 2FA backup codes, chat history, email queue). Phase 5: Added production guards to 2 admin pages. Phase 6: Email dedup changed from query+add to deterministic setDoc. Phase 7: 17 TODO markers for future phases.
testing: TypeScript compilation running in background. Pre-commit checks passed. Vercel deployment triggered.
notes: 40 files changed, 391 insertions, 247 deletions. ADR-253 status: DOCUMENTED → IMPLEMENTED. 17 TODO markers remain for future phases (RC-5/6/7/8, CW-2).

commits.message: fix(security): ADR-253 implementation — 54 fixes + 17 TODO markers across 40 files
